title: Cluster DNS resolution failing for payments endpoint

incident_input.summary: checkout unable to reach payments.internal — NXDOMAIN spikes

logs: connection refused: dial tcp: lookup payments.internal on 10.96.0.10:53: no such host

expected_root_cause: cluster DNS failing to resolve payments.internal — CoreDNS Corefile reloaded 4 minutes before incident dropped the internal zone

mock_investigation_output.root_cause: cluster DNS failing to resolve payments.internal — CoreDNS Corefile reloaded 4 minutes before incident dropped the internal zone
